author: danweinberger <daniel.weinberger@yale.edu>
weinbergerlab <dweinber@gmail.com>
message: fixes issues with WashPost county encoding that was breaking ingestion
try to rebuild package; separate out washpost from schoolvaxview

wapo_county_vax_rate.long_name: Washington Post County-Level School Vaccination Rate
wapo_county_vax_rate.short_description: MMR vaccination rate at the county level from Washington Post analysis.
wapo_county_vax_rate.long_description: County-level MMR vaccination rates compiled by the Washington Post from state health department data.

wapo_prepand_herd.short_description: Whether the county met herd immunity thresholds before the pandemic.
wapo_prepand_herd.long_description: Binary indicator for whether a county met herd immunity vaccination thresholds in pre-pandemic years (2018-2020), as determined by the Washington Post analysis of state health department data.

wapo_postpand_herd.short_description: Whether the county met herd immunity thresholds after the pandemic.
wapo_postpand_herd.long_description: Binary indicator for whether a county met herd immunity vaccination thresholds in post-pandemic years (2023-2025), as determined by the Washington Post analysis of state health department data.

wapo_school_mmr_rate.long_name: Washington Post School-Level MMR Vaccination Rate
wapo_school_mmr_rate.short_description: MMR vaccination rate at the school level from Washington Post analysis.
wapo_school_mmr_rate.long_description: School-level MMR vaccination rates compiled by the Washington Post from state health department data.

wapo_school_name.short_description: Name of the school as reported in state health department data.
wapo_school_name.long_description: Name of the school as reported in state health department vaccination records, compiled by the Washington Post.

wapo_school_type.short_description: Type or classification of the school (e.g., public, private).
wapo_school_type.long_description: Type or classification of the school (e.g., public, private, charter) as reported in state health department data, compiled by the Washington Post.

wapo_school_address.long_description: Street address of the school as reported in state health department vaccination records, compiled by the Washington Post.

wapo_students_enrolled.long_name: Number of students enrolled at the school
wapo_students_enrolled.short_description: Total number of students enrolled at the school.
wapo_students_enrolled.long_description: Total number of students enrolled at the school as reported in state health department vaccination records, compiled by the Washington Post.

wapo_school_overall_rate.long_name: Overall vaccination rate at the school
wapo_school_overall_rate.short_description: Overall vaccination rate at the school level.
wapo_school_overall_rate.long_description: Overall vaccination rate (all required vaccines) at the school level from state health department data, compiled by the Washington Post.

wapo_school_medical_exemption_rate.short_description: Percentage of students with medical vaccine exemptions.
wapo_school_medical_exemption_rate.long_description: Percentage of enrolled students with medical exemptions from vaccination requirements at the school level, from state health department data compiled by the Washington Post.

wapo_school_religious_exemption_rate.short_description: Percentage of students with religious vaccine exemptions.
wapo_school_religious_exemption_rate.long_description: Percentage of enrolled students with religious exemptions from vaccination requirements at the school level, from state health department data compiled by the Washington Post.

wapo_school_personal_exemption_rate.short_description: Percentage of students with personal belief vaccine exemptions.
wapo_school_personal_exemption_rate.long_description: Percentage of enrolled students with personal belief (philosophical) exemptions from vaccination requirements at the school level, from state health department data compiled by the Washington Post.

wapo_school_nonmedical_exemption_rate.short_description: Percentage of students with non-medical vaccine exemptions.
wapo_school_nonmedical_exemption_rate.long_description: Percentage of enrolled students with non-medical exemptions (religious or personal belief) from vaccination requirements at the school level, from state health department data compiled by the Washington Post.

wapo_school_overall_exemption_rate.short_description: Percentage of students with any type of vaccine exemption.
wapo_school_overall_exemption_rate.long_description: Percentage of enrolled students with any type of exemption (medical, religious, or personal belief) from vaccination requirements at the school level, from state health department data compiled by the Washington Post.

wapo_school_lat.short_description: Geographic latitude of the school location.
wapo_school_lat.long_description: Geographic latitude coordinate of the school, used for mapping and spatial analysis. Geocoded by the Washington Post.

wapo_school_lon.short_description: Geographic longitude of the school location.
wapo_school_lon.long_description: Geographic longitude coordinate of the school, used for mapping and spatial analysis. Geocoded by the Washington Post.

wapo_school_county.long_name: County where the school is located
wapo_school_county.short_description: Name of the county where the school is located.
wapo_school_county.long_description: County name for the school location, as determined by the Washington Post from state health department records or geocoding.

wapo_school_state.long_name: State where the school is located
wapo_school_state.short_description: State abbreviation where the school is located.
wapo_school_state.long_description: Two-letter state abbreviation for the school location, from state health department vaccination records compiled by the Washington Post.

wapo_school_grade.short_description: Grade level(s) reported for the school.
wapo_school_grade.long_description: Grade level(s) for which vaccination data is reported at the school, from state health department records compiled by the Washington Post.

wapo_school_vax.name: Washington Post School Vaccination Rates
wapo_school_vax.description: School and county-level vaccination rate data compiled by the Washington Post from state health department records.
wapo_school_vax.restrictions: Attribution required. Cite The Washington Post.
